function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 2026-03-20 for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and verified mentally: attachment path was read, single attachment ordering valid, recipient matches canonical entity record, and YAML subject quoting is safe. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: A durable outbound email draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing an outbound resend draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-03-20 Helios invoice attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system workflows, processed lowest inbox filename, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified recipient via entity primary_contact_email, used sending-email workflow for outbox record format, and deleted inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender `claudia@helios-tax.example` in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md matched `primary_contact_email` in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. The requested invoice dated 2026-03-20 exists at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md. Created outbound draft `60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md` with that attachment and then deleted the processed inbox item per workflow.
